{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ozriel’s Scythe
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Ozriel’s Scythe]] can slice an [[Iteration]] in half.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozriel’s Scythe]] is a weapon that [[Eithan]] used as an imitation.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
